narrative:
Bucyrus City has 7,292 registered voters, with 61.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.5 percentage points.
